messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Cloud DNS → OCI DNS

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Cloud DNS | OCI DNS |
| Managed Zone | Zone |
| Record Set | Record |

### OCI DNS

- Authoritative DNS
- Global anycast
- Traffic management

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_dns_zone" "zone" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  name         = "example.com"
  zone_type    = "PRIMARY"
}

resource "oci_dns_record" "a_record" {
  zone_name = oci_dns_zone.zone.name
  domain   = "www.example.com"
  record_type = "A"
  rdata    = "1.2.3.4"
}
```

### Traffic Management

- Weighted routing
- Geolocation
- Failover
- Health checks
